family_description: classic preset stories plus deterministic generated workload families for broader scheduler comparisons

scenarios.name: convoy-mix
scenarios.description: one long CPU-bound job arrives first, then several short interactive jobs queue behind it

scenarios.name: interactive-bursts
scenarios.description: staggered short requests compete with a background batch job, making response-time tradeoffs visible

scenarios.name: aging-pressure
scenarios.description: high-priority arrivals keep showing up while a low-priority batch job waits, stressing priority aging

scenarios.name: balanced-seed-17
scenarios.description: balanced arrivals and bursts for a neutral mixed workload baseline

scenarios.name: convoy-spike-seed-23
scenarios.description: one heavy batch job lands beside short arrivals to stress convoy risk and dispatch overhead

scenarios.name: latency-burst-seed-31
scenarios.description: many short interactive jobs with one medium batch tail, emphasizing response-time and fairness tails

scorecards.label: FCFS
scorecards.use_when: best when minimizing dispatch churn matters most
scorecards.headline: low overhead 6/6, throughput 6/6
scorecards.watch_out: watch out for slower first-response time across the pack

scorecards.label: SJF
scorecards.use_when: best when total batch completion time matters most
scorecards.headline: turnaround 4/6, waiting 4/6
scorecards.watch_out: watch out for slower first-response time across the pack

scorecards.label: SRTF
scorecards.use_when: best when total batch completion time matters most
scorecards.headline: turnaround 4/6, waiting 4/6
scorecards.watch_out: watch out for heavier context-switch overhead across the pack

scorecards.label: PRIORITY (aging=2)
scorecards.use_when: best when minimizing dispatch churn matters most
scorecards.headline: low overhead 6/6, throughput 6/6
scorecards.watch_out: watch out for a less even slowdown spread across processes

scorecards.label: RR (q=2)
scorecards.use_when: best when interactive first-response speed matters most
scorecards.headline: strongest relative showing on response, fairness without outright pack wins
scorecards.watch_out: watch out for higher queueing delay across the pack

scorecards.label: MLFQ (q=2/4/8, boost=12)
scorecards.use_when: best when interactive first-response speed matters most
scorecards.headline: response 3/6, fairness 2/6
scorecards.watch_out: watch out for heavier context-switch overhead across the pack
